problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Topological. Topological insulator surface state conduction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
